headline: If The Stock Market Bottomed Last Week: These 3 Stocks Could Triple From Today’s Prices
summary: The momentum trade just posted a brutal selloff, and the highest-beta names took the hardest hits. Three stocks now sit in the crosshairs of a potential rebound so violent it could reward patient speculators with triple-digit gains.

headline: NDAQ Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Index and FinTech Growth
summary: Nasdaq's Q2 earnings beat estimates as index and FinTech growth lifted revenues, expanded margins and drove record Market Services results.

headline: Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF Distributions

headline: Leverage Shares by Themes Launches RAML, the Leverage Shares 2X Long Memory Daily ETF
summary: GREENWICH, Conn., July 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leverage Shares by Themes is pleased to announce the launch of RAML, the Leverage Shares 2X Long Memory Daily ETF, available for trading beginning July 23, 2026. Designed for active traders seeking to express short-term views on the memory semiconductor market, RAML seeks to provide 200% of the daily performance of the Roundhill Memory ETF (ticker: DRAM), an ETF focused on companies across the global memory ecosystem. headline: What to Expect From Cboe Global Markets’ Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Cboe Global Markets is slated to report its second-quarter earnings by the end of this month, and analysts are forecasting double-digit earnings growth.
